meaning: n.圆形突出部(尤指耳垂),[植]圆裂片
examples: A checkup revealed a small tumour on the left lower lobe of his lung, but it had not yet metastasized.
For example, hormones from the hypothalamus in the brain stimulate the anterior lobe of the pituitary gland.
The oral shield is rounded with a distinct distal lobe.
Shortly after, doctors diagnosed a brain tumor -- a malignant glioma in his left parietal lobe.
In younger brains this kind of judgment happens on the right side of the parietal lobe.
